text: The quantitative relationship discussed in the Sustained AHR Activation (MIE) page and also presented on the KER page for Sustained AHR Activation --> Hepatotoxicity/Hepatopathy is common to dioxin-like chemicals (NTP, 2006a, 2006b, 2006c, 2006d, 2006e, 2006f). In addition, rats fed indole-3-carbinol for eight weeks in an initiation-promotion medium term assay showed the development of oxidative stress, likely due to induction of CYP1A and other phase I enzymes. The development of AHF, here noted as Changes in Cellular Growth Homeostasis / Apoptosis was also enhanced (Shimamoto et al. 2011).
